name: YTLiteDiarrhea
subtitle: YouTube Plus (YTLite) builds by diarrhea3
description: Automatically updated AltStore/SideStore source for YouTube Plus (YTLite) IPA builds from github.com/diarrhea3/YTLiteDiarrhea.

apps.name: YouTube Plus
apps.subtitle: YouTube with 100+ enhancements
apps.localizedDescription:
YouTube Plus (YTLite) is a flexible enhancer for YouTube on iOS.

• Download videos, audio, thumbnails, posts and profile pictures
• Interface customization: remove feed elements, reorder tabs, OLED mode, Shorts-only mode
• Player settings: gestures, default quality, preferred audio track
• Built-in SponsorBlock
• YouPiP (Picture-in-Picture)
• YTUHD (1440p / 4K unlock)
• Return YouTube Dislikes
• And much more!

privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Used to access media for uploads.
